Unsupported file format: Unsupported file format. Please enable MinerU for this file type and try again.
Please provide a file (multipart, base64: Please provide a file via multipart upload, base64 encoding, or server path
MinerU token description: MinerU supports high-accuracy parsing for PDF, Office documents, and images with table recognition, formula parsing, and 109-language support. Register for a free API token.
MinerU settings hint: When enabled, this file type will be processed by MinerU cloud. When disabled, the local engine is used (images require MinerU to be enabled).
MinerU OCR options hint: Enabling OCR will significantly increase processing time but is required for scanned PDFs and images.
API Base URL hint: Default is MinerU official API. Use http://your-ip:port for local deployment.
OCR tooltip: Required for scanned PDFs and images. Significantly increases processing time.
Table tooltip: Recognize table structures and preserve row/column relationships.
Formula tooltip: Recognize math formulas (LaTeX). Not needed for normal documents.
PDF tooltip: Process PDF files via MinerU cloud (includes OCR for scans)
Word tooltip: Process Word documents via MinerU cloud
Excel tooltip: Process Excel spreadsheets via MinerU cloud
PPT tooltip: Process PPT presentations via MinerU cloud
Image tooltip: Process images via MinerU OCR. Images require MinerU to be enabled.
